steps.title: Identify the parallel structure
steps.content: Three verb phrases follow can: clone themselves, enter a dormant state in times of drought, and grow in areas that don't have soil. All three are parallel items within a single independent clause.

steps.title: Apply the comma rule for series
steps.content: Commas separate parallel items in a series: can A, B, and C. A comma after clone themselves follows this rule. Choices A and C incorrectly use punctuation (semicolon, period) that separates independent clauses, and choice D omits the required comma. That matches choice B — B is correct.
